project_metadata.name: Vibe POS
project_metadata.stack: Tauri v2, Next.js 16, Rust, Diesel ORM, SQLCipher
project_metadata.description: Local-first encrypted Point of Sale system with dynamic UI scaling and content-addressable image storage.

database.purpose: Diesel ORM models, SQLCipher connection, and migrations.

settings_lib.purpose: Manages unencrypted settings.json for UI preferences.

export_lib.purpose: Data export logic for CSV, XLSX, and ODS formats.

image_lib.purpose: Content-addressable storage for product images using SHA-256.

categories.pos: Main POS interface and product grid.
categories.manage: Management tables and forms (Products, Stock, Categories).
categories.ui: Reusable base components (Button, Input, Table, etc.).

contexts.SettingsContext: UI scaling, theme tokens, and undo/redo.
contexts.DatabaseContext: SQLCipher key management and connection state.

api_layer.core: invoke.ts (Tauri invoke wrapper with mock support)

financial_precision.strategy: Integer scaling (Satang) to avoid float inaccuracies.

image_storage.strategy: Content-addressable storage (SHA-256) in app data directory.
image_storage.coordinate_system: Packed position string 'X% Y%|Scale' for object-position control.

registry_relations.component_to_command: Frontend components in @src/components/ navigate through @src/lib/api/ to trigger Rust commands in @src-tauri/src/commands/.
registry_relations.model_consistency: TypeScript types in @src/lib/types/ must align with Diesel models in @src-tauri/database/src/mod.rs.
registry_relations.design_tokens: Settings defined in @src/context/settings/constants.ts are injected as CSS variables used by @src/app/styles/tokens.css.
